_comment: Add these entries to your ~/.claude/settings.json hooks section.
_comment2: The PostToolUse hook logs every Skill invocation to ~/.claude/skill_usage.log.
_comment3: The statusline.sh reads that log to show the active skill in the status bar.

hooks.command: skill=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.skill // empty'); if [[ -n "$skill" ]]; then printf '%s\t%s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" "$skill" >> ~/.claude/skill_usage.log; fi
